name: random_data
description: Generate random test data: UUIDs, names, email addresses, hex colours, integers, or Lorem Ipsum text. Use when the user needs sample data, placeholder content, test fixtures, or random identifiers.

type.description: The type of random data to generate

count.description: How many items to generate (default: 1, max: 20)

options.description: Type-specific options: for 'integer' use { min: number, max: number }; for 'lorem' use { words: number }

words.description: Number of Lorem Ipsum words to generate (default: 20)
